title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Cross-Client Lab
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a progressively disclosed skill package with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-asset-reuse-qrfwoy: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Asset Reuse into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-asset-reuse-qrfwoy:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write the lab evidence note for Asset Reuse: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed lab case for agent ext progressive disclosure that tests this competency: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Asset Reuse through the concrete a progressively disclosed skill package case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
